name: Viacom Inc.
description: Viacom Inc. was a prominent global media conglomerate that specialized in video and audio communications, operating through two primary segments: media networks and film entertainment. The company owned and managed a diverse portfolio of influential brands, including MTV, VH1, Comedy Central, Nickelodeon, and Paramount Pictures. Originally formed in 1971 as a spin-off from CBS, Viacom played a significant role in shaping global entertainment culture. In 2019, the company merged with CBS Corporation to form ViacomCBS, which was later rebranded as Paramount Global, continuing its legacy in the media and entertainment industry.
